college_info.intro: BRD College of Management and Sciences offers MBA, BBA, MCom and DPharm as its popular courses. Admission to these courses is based on merit and entrance exam scores as per the college guidelines. The minimum eligibility requires the candidates to pass Class 12 from a recognised board with 45% marks in any stream from a recognised board. MBA, MCom and DPharm are offered for the duration of 2 years, whereas BBA is a 3-year degree. All these courses are affiliated with different universities and colleges. paragraphs: Candidates are shortlisted for the courses offered byS. Chavan College Of Pharmacythrough a merit-based admission process. The institute currently offers courses at the UG, PG and Doctorate levels.

For admission to the courses provided byS. Chavan College Of Pharmacy, candidates must complete the application form, which is available online on the official website of the institute. For the offline availability of the application form, students must check with the college admission department. The institute provides courses in in stream ofMedicine and Health Sciences. There are several courses for candidates to choose from at S. Chavan College Of Pharmacy. Courses are offered at various levels, including UG, PG and Doctorate.
